This is a debate bro tactic Vance uses a lot: trying to discredit his opponents by suggesting they don’t possess the expertise to stand up an opinion (in this case, that unprovoked war is bad).

He relies on it so lazily that he ended up arguing the Pope doesn’t understand theology.
